package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoPerfLayerMemoryAllocationClosureCaptureAllocatesInLoop() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_memory_allocation_closure_capture_allocates_in_loop"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Layer: Memory allocation. Flag loop-local closures that capture variables in high-frequency paths and may force heap allocation."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
